(ھـ‎); to cover (ھـ‎ a distance); to survive (ھـ‎ s. th., e. g., a danger), surmount, overcome (ھـ‎ s. th., e. g., a difficulty), get over s. th. (ھـ‎); to spend, pass, while away (ھـ‎ في‎ time with); to use up, consume (ھـ‎ food); to decide (ھـ‎ or ب‎ s. th.); to say with certainty, assert, declare positively (ب‎ s. th.), affirm confidently, aver (بأن‎ that); to prove (بأن‎ that); pass. quṭi’a to break, break apart, be or get broken, be or become interrupted; to snap (rope, string of a musical instrument) ; (الرجاء‎) الأمل‎ قطع‎ (amal, rajā’) to give up hope, to despair;الثمن‎ قطع‎ (ṯaman) to fix the price, agree on the price;(بطاقة‎)تذكرة‎ قطع‎ (taḏkiratan) to buy a ticket;حديثه‎ عليه‎ قطع‎ (ḥadīṯahū) to interrupt s. o., cut s. o. short, cut in on s. o.’s talk; دورا ‎ قطع‎ (dauran) to pass through a phase or period, go through a stage; برأي‎ قطع‎ (bi- ra’yin) to express a firm opinion; to decide in favor of an opinion; برأيه‎ قطع‎ (bi- ra’yihī) to be guided in one’s decisions by s. o., proceed in accordance with s. o.’s opinion or decision; الرحم‎ قطع‎ (raḥim) to sever the bonds of kinship, break with one’s relatives; to violate the rules of consanguinity; أشواطا‎ قطع‎ (ašwāṭan) to make progress;( الرقي‎) التقدم‎ في‎ (بعيدا‎)كبيرا‎ شوطا‎ قطع‎) (šauṭan, taqaddum, ruqīy) and أشواطا‎ الرقي‎ ميدان‎ في‎ قطع‎ (maidāni r-r.) to make great progress, make great headway; الطريق‎ عليه ‎ قطع‎ to cut off s. o.’s way, intercept s. o.; to engage in highway robbery; to waylay s. o., commit highway robbery on s. o.; عقله‎ يقطع‎ لا‎ (‘aqlahū) it won’t get into his head, he can’t understand or believe it; عھدا‎ قطع‎ (‘ahdan) to make a contract; to make a promise, vow, or pledge (ل‎ to s. o.); ب‎ عھدا‎ نفسه‎ على‎ قطع‎ (‘ahdan) and ب‎ نفسه‎ على‎ الوعد‎ قطع‎ (wa‘da) to vow s. th., pledge o. s. or bind o. s. to do s. th.; الكمبيالة‎ قطع‎ to discount the bill of exchange; لسنه‎ قطع‎ (lisānahū) to silence s. o., seal s. o.’s lips, gag s. o.; الوقت‎ قطع‎ (waqt) to while away the time, kill time
